title: Huawei OptiXstar HG8010N-10, GPON ONT bridge
category: Huawei / Optical networks / GPON / ONU units
description: The Huawei OptiXstar HG8010N-10 is an ONT unit for use in bridge mode, equipped with (1) SC/APC port for connection to a GPON installation and (1) 2.5G port for connecting a router. It is ideally suited for scenarios where you prefer your own customer-side routing solution or when the customer requires the use of their own router Device Power adapter 12V/1A
specsSearch: Optics Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 / 1490 Transfer type GPON Polishing type APC Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 27 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Power Max. power consumption [W] 5 Power via connector/terminal 12V / 1A
